title: Rain World Origins
description: This is a mod that acts to add many slugcats from the Rain World Downpour DLC such as Saint and Artificer. This mod not only adds these origins but also adds many in game items and effects such as Rubbish.
body:
# Rain World Origins
This is a mod that acts to add many slugcats from the Rain World Downpour DLC such as Saint and Artificer. This mod not only adds these origins but also adds many in game items and effects such as Rubbish.
[Source](https://github.com/InvertedOwl/rain-world-origins)

**[Pehkui](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pehkui/files/4020363) is a dependancy**


## *World Changes*

### Spears
Spears are craftable weapons. They are also one time use and can not be picked up.
(Shapeless)
![Spear Crafting recipe](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014010180872196178/1113637071890956408/crafting-grid_1.png)
### Explosive Spears
Explosive spears are spears that will explode on impact with entity or shortly after impacting blocks.
(Shapeless)
![Explosive Spear Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014010180872196178/1113934844506943630/crafting-grid_3.png)
### Rubbish
Rubbish, like in Rain World, can stun enemies when thrown. It also can not be picked up after use
(Shapeless)
![Rubbish Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014010180872196178/1113935942567329813/crafting-grid_4.png)
### Explosive Rubbish
Explosive version of rubbish
(Shapeless)

‚Äé ‚Äé 
 
![Explosive Rubbish Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1014010180872196178/1121844302625120316/crafting-grid_6.png)
## *Origins*
 ‚Äé 
‚Äé 
‚Äé ‚Äé 
 
‚Äé 
‚Äé  


### Artificer
![Artificer](https://static.miraheze.org/rainworldwiki/2/29/Artificer_portrait.png)

\+ Can craft tnt at any point with one cobblestone
 
\+ Can throw tnt at the cost of hunger. This thrown tnt will be half the power of typical tnt.
 
\+ Explosive jump (primary)
 
 
\- Water damage
 
\- Carnivore
 
\- Smaller than typical player
 ‚Äé 
‚Äé 
‚Äé ‚Äé 
 
‚Äé 
‚Äé  

### Rivulet
![Rivulet](https://static.miraheze.org/rainworldwiki/5/5c/Rivulet_portrait.png) 

\+ Much faster on land
 
\+ Much faster underwater
 
\+ Can breathe underwater
 
\+ Better vision
 
\+ Much higher jump
 
\+ Fast block breaking
 

\- Lower health than typical
 
\- Smaller than typical
 ‚Äé 
‚Äé 
‚Äé ‚Äé 
 
‚Äé 
‚Äé  

### Saint
![Saint](https://static.miraheze.org/rainworldwiki/6/6e/Saint_portrait.png)
 
\+ Powerful tongue that can be used to swing and get out of trouble (primary)
 
\+ Fall protection
 
\+ Levitate (secondary)
 
\+ Ascend (secondary + crouch)
 

\- Significantly less health
 
\- Vegetarian
 
\- Smaller than typical
 ‚Äé 
‚Äé 
‚Äé ‚Äé 
 
‚Äé 
‚Äé  

### Spearmaster
![Spearmaster](https://static.miraheze.org/rainworldwiki/8/8a/Spearmaster_portrait.png)
 
\+ Infinite spears. Can only hold 2 at a time. (primary)

\+ Extra health

\- Must throw spears at entities to feed
 
\- Smaller than typical
 ‚Äé 
‚Äé 
‚Äé ‚Äé 
 
‚Äé 
‚Äé  

### Gourmand
![Gourmand](https://static.miraheze.org/rainworldwiki/b/ba/Gourmand_portrait.png?20230122012942)
 
\+ Stronger than typical

\+ Can regurgitate random items from a list (primary).

\- Slighty slower
 
\- Smaller than typical
